message:
deps: bump rayon 1.11.0 -> 1.12.0

Minor bump within 1.x. Additive API (new ParallelIterator combinators);
existing `par_iter` / `join` call sites compile unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ libc = "0.2.185"
 memchr = "2.8.0"
 parking_lot = "0.12.5"
 proptest = "1.11.0"
-rayon = "1.11.0"
+rayon = "1.12.0"
 serde = { version = "1.0.218", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = { version = "1.0.140", features = ["preserve_order"] }
 sha2 = "0.10.8"
